name: @0xhoneyjar/loa-hounfour-stub
description: RC-staging stub for @0xhoneyjar/loa-hounfour. Bundles main's compiled dist + cherry-picks the v8.6.0 cycle-005 cluster export surface so consumer `file:./` installs work without symlinking. NA-2 fix per cycle-005 PRD: `private: true` makes `npm publish` fail with EPRIVATE; bundled `_main/` carries production schema $id values byte-for-byte.
